requirement_topic.en: NRTL Electrical Safety Listing — UL 62368-1 / UL 60335
requirement_topic.zh: NRTL电气安全认证 — UL 62368-1 / UL 60335
requirement_topic.zht: NRTL電氣安全認證 — UL 62368-1 / UL 60335

summary.en: Data-center liquid-cooling equipment (cold plates, coolant distribution units / CDUs) sold in the US must carry an NRTL listing before most Authorities Having Jurisdiction (AHJs) will allow installation. ICT-facing electrical components of the CDU (controls, power supply, fans, pumps driven by low-voltage electronics) are evaluated against UL 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements, 3rd Ed.), which superseded UL 60950-1 and UL 60065 in 2022. Mechanically driven pump and refrigeration sub-assemblies intended for unattended operation may additionally require evaluation under UL 60335-2-34 (Hermetic Motor-Compressors) or UL 60335-2-41 (Pumps). OSHA recognises NRTLs under 29 CFR 1910.7; accepted NRTLs include UL, CSA, Intertek (ETL), and TUV SUD. [UNVERIFIED: applicability of UL 60335-2-41 specifically to CDU pump sub-assemblies — confirm scope with NRTL before testing.]
summary.zh: 在美国销售的数据中心液冷设备（冷板、冷却液分配单元/CDU）在大多数有管辖权当局（AHJ）批准安装前须取得NRTL认证。CDU中面向ICT侧的电气部件（控制器、电源、风扇、由低压电子驱动的泵）依据UL 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备安全要求，第3版）进行评估，该标准于2022年取代UL 60950-1与UL 60065。用于无人值守运行的机械驱动泵及制冷子组件可能还须依据UL 60335-2-34（全封闭电动压缩机）或UL 60335-2-41（泵）进行评估。OSHA依据29 CFR 1910.7认可各NRTL机构，包括UL、CSA、Intertek（ETL）及TUV SUD。[未经核实：UL 60335-2-41是否明确适用于CDU泵子组件——请在测试前与NRTL确认适用范围。]
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的資料中心液冷設備（冷板、冷卻液分配單元/CDU）在大多數有管轄權當局（AHJ）批准安裝前須取得NRTL認證。CDU中面向ICT側的電氣部件（控制器、電源、風扇、由低壓電子驅動的泵）依據UL 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通訊技術設備安全要求，第3版）進行評估，該標準於2022年取代UL 60950-1與UL 60065。用於無人值守運行的機械驅動泵及製冷子組件可能還須依據UL 60335-2-34（全封閉電動壓縮機）或UL 60335-2-41（泵）進行評估。OSHA依據29 CFR 1910.7認可各NRTL機構，包括UL、CSA、Intertek（ETL）及TUV SUD。[未經核實：UL 60335-2-41是否明確適用於CDU泵子組件——請在測試前與NRTL確認適用範圍。]

standards_or_laws: UL 62368-1 Ed. 3 — Audio/Video, IT and Communication Technology Equipment Safety (NRTL listing required)
UL 60335-2-34 — Particular Requirements for Motor-Compressors (hermetic refrigerant pump sub-assemblies)
UL 60335-2-41 — Particular Requirements for Pumps [UNVERIFIED scope for CDU pumps]
29 CFR 1910.7 — OSHA NRTL Recognition Program
NEC Article 110.3(B) — Equipment listed by NRTL must be installed per listing and labeling instructions

summary.en: Chinese CDU and cold-plate manufacturers typically hold GB 4943.1 (Safety of IT Equipment, equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and/or GB/T 42315 (the Chinese adoption of IEC 62368-1) certifications issued by CCC-authorised labs (e.g. CCAI, CTI). Pump sub-assemblies may be assessed under GB 4706.70 (hermetic motor-compressors, aligned with IEC 60335-2-34). GB/T 51409-2021 (Technical Standard for Green Data Centers) and YD/T 2378 series address data-center cooling system performance but are not equipment-level safety standards. [UNVERIFIED: GB/T 42315 adoption status and whether CCC mark is mandatory for CDU exports — CCC is mandatory only for products in the CCC catalogue; CDUs may not be listed.]
summary.zh: 中国CDU与冷板制造商通常持有由CCC授权实验室（如CCAI、CTI）颁发的GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，等同IEC 60950-1）和/或GB/T 42315（IEC 62368-1中国版本）认证。泵子组件可依据GB 4706.70（全封闭电动压缩机，对应IEC 60335-2-34）进行评估。GB/T 51409-2021（绿色数据中心技术标准）及YD/T 2378系列涵盖数据中心冷却系统性能，但不属于设备级安全标准。[未经核实：GB/T 42315采用状态及CCC标志是否强制适用于CDU出口——CCC仅对列入目录的产品强制要求，CDU可能不在此列。]
summary.zht: 中國CDU與冷板製造商通常持有由CCC授權實驗室（如CCAI、CTI）頒發的GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，等同IEC 60950-1）和/或GB/T 42315（IEC 62368-1中國版本）認證。泵子組件可依據GB 4706.70（全封閉電動壓縮機，對應IEC 60335-2-34）進行評估。GB/T 51409-2021（綠色資料中心技術標準）及YD/T 2378系列涵蓋資料中心冷卻系統性能，但不屬於設備級安全標準。[未經核實：GB/T 42315採用狀態及CCC標誌是否強制適用於CDU出口——CCC僅對列入目錄的產品強制要求，CDU可能不在此列。]

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Safety of Information Technology Equipment (aligned with IEC 60950-1 / partial IEC 62368-1 transition)
GB/T 42315-2023 — Safety Requirements for Audio/Video, IT and Communication Equipment (IEC 62368-1 adoption) [UNVERIFIED mandatory status for CDUs]
GB 4706.70-2008 — Particular Requirements for Hermetic Motor-Compressors (aligned with IEC 60335-2-34)
GB/T 51409-2021 — Technical Standard for Green Data Center (performance, not equipment safety)
YD/T 2378.1-2013 — Data Center Liquid Cooling System Technical Requirements

gap.en: US AHJs and data-center operators require an NRTL listing mark (UL, ETL, CSA, etc.) issued by an OSHA-recognized lab. Chinese GB certifications and CCC marks are not recognised by US AHJs and cannot substitute for NRTL listing. A Chinese manufacturer must engage an NRTL directly to test and list the product to UL 62368-1 (and UL 60335 sub-parts where applicable) before shipment. Additionally, the transition from IEC 60950-1 (GB 4943.1) to IEC 62368-1 (UL 62368-1 / GB/T 42315) means products certified only to the older Chinese standard may fail the current US standard's hazard-based safety engineering (HBSE) framework.
gap.zh: 美国AHJ及数据中心运营商要求产品贴有OSHA认可实验室颁发的NRTL认证标志（UL、ETL、CSA等）。中国的GB认证及CCC标志不被美国AHJ认可，无法替代NRTL认证。中国制造商须在发货前直接委托NRTL依据UL 62368-1（及适用的UL 60335子部分）进行测试和认证。此外，从IEC 60950-1（GB 4943.1）向IEC 62368-1（UL 62368-1/GB/T 42315）的过渡意味着仅持有旧版中国标准认证的产品可能无法满足美国现行标准基于危害的安全工程（HBSE）框架要求。
gap.zht: 美國AHJ及資料中心運營商要求產品貼有OSHA認可實驗室頒發的NRTL認證標誌（UL、ETL、CSA等）。中國的GB認證及CCC標誌不被美國AHJ認可，無法替代NRTL認證。中國製造商須在發貨前直接委託NRTL依據UL 62368-1（及適用的UL 60335子部分）進行測試和認證。此外，從IEC 60950-1（GB 4943.1）向IEC 62368-1（UL 62368-1/GB/T 42315）的過渡意味著僅持有舊版中國標準認證的產品可能無法滿足美國現行標準基於危害的安全工程（HBSE）框架要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRTL listing is required by AHJs under NEC 110.3(B) before installation in US data centers; enforced at the local permit/inspection level
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-catalogue products (CCC mark); GB 4943.1 / GB/T 42315 apply to IT equipment sold in China — mandatory status for CDU export products requires confirmation [UNVERIFIED]

source.publisher: OSHA — Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) Program

compliance_verdict.en: Non-compliant until NRTL listing obtained. Chinese GB/CCC credentials are not accepted by US AHJs. Manufacturer must contract an NRTL to test and list the CDU/cold-plate system to UL 62368-1 Ed. 3 (and relevant UL 60335 sub-parts) before US sale or installation. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 在获得NRTL认证之前，产品不符合美国要求。中国的GB/CCC认证不被美国AHJ接受。制造商须委托NRTL依据UL 62368-1第3版（及相关UL 60335子部分）对CDU/冷板系统进行测试和认证，方可在美国销售或安装。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或法规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 在獲得NRTL認證之前，產品不符合美國要求。中國的GB/CCC認證不被美國AHJ接受。製造商須委託NRTL依據UL 62368-1第3版（及相關UL 60335子部分）對CDU/冷板系統進行測試和認證，方可在美國銷售或安裝。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或法規建議。

requirement_topic.en: ASHRAE TC 9.9 Liquid-Cooling Guidelines, NEC Electrical Install & ASME Pressure Vessels
requirement_topic.zh: ASHRAE TC 9.9液冷指南、NEC电气安装及ASME压力容器
requirement_topic.zht: ASHRAE TC 9.9液冷指南、NEC電氣安裝及ASME壓力容器

summary.en: Three complementary US requirements govern liquid-cooling system installation in data centers beyond the equipment safety listing: (1) ASHRAE TC 9.9 Liquid Cooling Guidelines for Datacom Equipment — an industry best-practice document (not a law) widely adopted by hyperscale and co-location operators as a contractual or procurement requirement; it specifies coolant supply temperatures, pressure, flow rates, leak detection, and secondary-loop design for direct liquid cooling (DLC) and rear-door heat exchangers (RDHx). (2) NEC (NFPA 70) governs all electrical wiring and connections of the CDU to facility power; relevant articles include 110 (general requirements), 300 (wiring methods), and 645 (information technology equipment rooms). Installation must be performed or supervised by a licensed electrician and inspected by the AHJ. (3) ASME Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code (BPVC) Section VIII Division 1 applies if the CDU contains pressure vessels (e.g., expansion tanks, high-pressure refrigerant receivers) exceeding 15 psi internal pressure and 6 inches inside diameter; such vessels must be ASME-stamped. [UNVERIFIED: whether typical CDU operating pressures and vessel dimensions trigger mandatory ASME BPVC scope — confirm with mechanical engineer and AHJ.]
summary.zh: 除设备安全认证外，还有三项互补的美国要求规范数据中心液冷系统的安装：(1) ASHRAE TC 9.9《数据通信设备液冷指南》——一份行业最佳实践文件（非法律法规），被超大规模及托管运营商广泛作为合同或采购要求采用；内容涵盖直接液冷（DLC）和后门热交换器（RDHx）的冷却液供应温度、压力、流量、泄漏检测及二次回路设计。(2) NEC（NFPA 70）规范CDU与设施电源之间的所有电气接线和连接；相关条款包括第110条（通用要求）、第300条（布线方法）及第645条（信息技术设备机房）；安装须由持证电工执行或监督，并经AHJ检查。(3) ASME锅炉及压力容器规范（BPVC）第VIII卷第1分册适用于CDU中压力容器（如膨胀箱、高压制冷剂储液器）内压超过15 psi且内径超过6英寸的情形；此类容器须获得ASME印记。[未经核实：典型CDU工作压力和容器尺寸是否触发强制ASME BPVC适用范围——请与机械工程师及AHJ确认。]
summary.zht: 除設備安全認證外，還有三項互補的美國要求規範資料中心液冷系統的安裝：(1) ASHRAE TC 9.9《資料通訊設備液冷指南》——一份行業最佳實踐文件（非法律法規），被超大規模及託管運營商廣泛作為合同或採購要求採用；內容涵蓋直接液冷（DLC）和後門熱交換器（RDHx）的冷卻液供應溫度、壓力、流量、洩漏檢測及二次回路設計。(2) NEC（NFPA 70）規範CDU與設施電源之間的所有電氣接線和連接；相關條款包括第110條（通用要求）、第300條（佈線方法）及第645條（資訊技術設備機房）；安裝須由持證電工執行或監督，並經AHJ檢查。(3) ASME鍋爐及壓力容器規範（BPVC）第VIII卷第1分冊適用於CDU中壓力容器（如膨脹箱、高壓製冷劑儲液器）內壓超過15 psi且內徑超過6英寸的情形；此類容器須獲得ASME印記。[未經核實：典型CDU工作壓力和容器尺寸是否觸發強制ASME BPVC適用範圍——請與機械工程師及AHJ確認。]

standards_or_laws: ASHRAE TC 9.9 — Liquid Cooling Guidelines for Datacom Equipment Centers (industry best practice, not law)
NFPA 70 / NEC 2023 Article 110 — General Requirements for Electrical Installations
NFPA 70 / NEC 2023 Article 300 — Wiring Methods and Materials
NFPA 70 / NEC 2023 Article 645 — Information Technology Equipment
ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 1 — Rules for Construction of Pressure Vessels (ASME stamp required where applicable)

summary.en: Chinese data-center liquid cooling practice is governed by GB/T 51409-2021 (Technical Standard for Green Data Centers), which includes liquid-cooling system design requirements for CDUs, cold plates, and coolant loops. YD/T 2378.1-2013 (Data Center Liquid Cooling System Technical Requirements) provides telecom-sector specific guidance. Electrical installation in Chinese data centers follows GB 50174-2017 (Code for Design of Electronic Information System Room) and GB 50054-2011 (Code for Design of Low-Voltage Electrical Installations). Pressure vessels in China are regulated under TSG 21-2016 (Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Stationary Pressure Vessels), administered by the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR); vessels above specified thresholds require SAMR registration and periodic inspection. [UNVERIFIED: TSG 21 pressure threshold that triggers mandatory registration for CDU-scale vessels.]
summary.zh: 中国数据中心液冷实践由GB/T 51409-2021（绿色数据中心技术标准）规范，包括CDU、冷板及冷却液回路的液冷系统设计要求。YD/T 2378.1-2013（数据中心液冷系统技术要求）提供电信行业专项指导。中国数据中心电气安装遵循GB 50174-2017（电子信息系统机房设计规范）及GB 50054-2011（低压配电设计规范）。中国压力容器受TSG 21-2016（固定式压力容器安全技术监察规程）监管，由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）负责执行；超过规定阈值的容器须向SAMR登记并接受定期检验。[未经核实：触发CDU级容器强制登记要求的TSG 21压力阈值。]
summary.zht: 中國資料中心液冷實踐由GB/T 51409-2021（綠色資料中心技術標準）規範，包括CDU、冷板及冷卻液回路的液冷系統設計要求。YD/T 2378.1-2013（資料中心液冷系統技術要求）提供電信行業專項指導。中國資料中心電氣安裝遵循GB 50174-2017（電子資訊系統機房設計規範）及GB 50054-2011（低壓配電設計規範）。中國壓力容器受TSG 21-2016（固定式壓力容器安全技術監察規程）監管，由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）負責執行；超過規定閾值的容器須向SAMR登記並接受定期檢驗。[未經核實：觸發CDU級容器強制登記要求的TSG 21壓力閾值。]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 51409-2021 — Technical Standard for Green Data Center (includes liquid cooling system design)
YD/T 2378.1-2013 — Data Center Liquid Cooling System Technical Requirements
GB 50174-2017 — Code for Design of Electronic Information System Room
GB 50054-2011 — Code for Design of Low-Voltage Electrical Installations
TSG 21-2016 — Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Stationary Pressure Vessels (SAMR)

gap.en: ASHRAE TC 9.9 compliance is effectively mandatory in the US market because major data-center operators and co-location providers incorporate it into contractual specifications; Chinese GB/T 51409 and YD/T standards are not recognised by US operators. NEC electrical installation requirements must be met at the site level by US-licensed contractors regardless of equipment origin; Chinese GB 50174 / GB 50054 are irrelevant to US AHJ inspections. ASME BPVC stamping is required for pressure vessels meeting US dimensional/pressure thresholds; Chinese TSG 21 registration does not satisfy US AHJ requirements. No mutual recognition agreement (MRA) exists between ASME and SAMR for pressure vessel certification.
gap.zh: ASHRAE TC 9.9合规在美国市场实际上是强制性的，因为主要数据中心运营商及托管服务商已将其纳入合同规范；中国的GB/T 51409和YD/T标准不被美国运营商认可。NEC电气安装要求须在工地层面由美国持证承包商满足，与设备来源无关；中国的GB 50174/GB 50054与美国AHJ检查无关。符合美国尺寸/压力阈值的压力容器须获得ASME BPVC认证印记；中国TSG 21登记不满足美国AHJ要求。ASME与SAMR之间不存在压力容器认证的相互认可协议（MRA）。
gap.zht: ASHRAE TC 9.9合規在美國市場實際上是強制性的，因為主要資料中心運營商及託管服務商已將其納入合同規範；中國的GB/T 51409和YD/T標準不被美國運營商認可。NEC電氣安裝要求須在工地層面由美國持證承包商滿足，與設備來源無關；中國的GB 50174/GB 50054與美國AHJ檢查無關。符合美國尺寸/壓力閾值的壓力容器須獲得ASME BPVC認證印記；中國TSG 21登記不滿足美國AHJ要求。ASME與SAMR之間不存在壓力容器認證的相互認可協議（MRA）。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — ASHRAE TC 9.9 is industry-mandatory (contractual, not law); NEC electrical installation is legally mandatory (enforced by AHJ at permit/inspection); ASME BPVC stamping is legally mandatory for qualifying pressure vessels under most US state boiler and pressure vessel laws
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 51409-2021 is a national standard (recommended, not compulsory on its own, but referenced by mandatory regulations); TSG 21 pressure vessel registration is mandatory above specified thresholds under SAMR

source.publisher: ASHRAE — Technical Committee 9.9, Mission Critical Facilities, Data Centers, Technology Spaces and Electronic Equipment

compliance_verdict.en: Significant gaps exist across all three areas. Chinese exporters must: (1) verify CDU design meets ASHRAE TC 9.9 coolant specifications before engaging US data-center customers; (2) ensure NEC-compliant electrical connections are handled by a licensed US contractor at the installation site; (3) assess whether any CDU pressure vessel components require ASME BPVC Section VIII stamping. None of the Chinese equivalent certifications (GB/T 51409, TSG 21, GB 50174) are accepted by US AHJs or data-center operators. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 三个领域均存在显著差距。中国出口商须：(1) 在接触美国数据中心客户前核实CDU设计符合ASHRAE TC 9.9冷却液规范；(2) 确保符合NEC的电气连接由持证美国承包商在安装现场处理；(3) 评估CDU压力容器部件是否需要ASME BPVC第VIII卷认证印记。中国的等效认证（GB/T 51409、TSG 21、GB 50174）均不被美国AHJ或数据中心运营商接受。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或法规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 三個領域均存在顯著差距。中國出口商須：(1) 在接觸美國資料中心客戶前核實CDU設計符合ASHRAE TC 9.9冷卻液規範；(2) 確保符合NEC的電氣連接由持證美國承包商在安裝現場處理；(3) 評估CDU壓力容器部件是否需要ASME BPVC第VIII卷認證印記。中國的等效認證（GB/T 51409、TSG 21、GB 50174）均不被美國AHJ或資料中心運營商接受。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或法規建議。
